justification: The diff correctly updates Spring Boot to 3.x, migrates javax.* to jakarta.* imports, updates deprecated dependencies (mysql-connector-java -> mysql-connector-j, flyway-core -> flyway-mysql), and removes deprecated SpringExtension usage. However, it doesn't leverage any Java 21-specific idioms (records, pattern matching, virtual threads, etc.) beyond the version bump, and the MavenWrapperDownloader.java import cleanup is minor. The diff is coherent with no spurious changes.
